title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. If Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) is enabled, a backup code or registered device is required.

title: Email Verification Failed
content: If you see 'Verification link expired', request a new link from Profile > Email. Verification links expire in 10 minutes.

title: Billing and Subscription
content: Basic plan: $10/user/month. Pro plan: $25/user/month with audit logs and SSO. Enterprise: custom pricing with SLA and dedicated support.

title: SSO Login Issues
content: SSO failures often occur if the identity provider metadata is outdated. Refresh SAML metadata under Admin Portal > SSO Settings.

title: Exporting Reports
content: Admins can export audit reports in CSV or JSON from the Analytics tab. Exports over 100 MB are automatically compressed.

title: API Rate Limits
content: Each API key is limited to 200 requests per minute. For bulk imports, use the /batch endpoint supporting up to 10,000 records per request.

title: System Outage Notification
content: Outages and maintenance updates are posted at status.productgenie.io. Users can subscribe via email or RSS feed.

title: Dark Mode Not Saving
content: Dark mode preferences are stored in browser local storage. If dark mode resets on refresh, ensure cookies and local storage are not being cleared. Try a different browser or disable extensions that manage storage.

title: Email Templates Not Loading
content: If email templates fail to load in the editor, try clearing the cache from Settings > Advanced > Clear Cache. If the issue persists, disable browser extensions and retry. Templates require JavaScript to be enabled.

title: CSV Upload Timeout
content: CSV uploads that exceed 5 MB may time out on slow connections. Split large files into smaller batches under 5 MB. For enterprise users, the /batch API endpoint supports uploads up to 50 MB.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
content: Enable 2FA from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Supported methods include TOTP apps (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy) and SMS. Save your backup codes in a secure location.

title: User Role Permissions
content: Admins can manage user roles under Admin Portal > User Management. Available roles are: Viewer (read-only), Editor (read/write), Admin (full access). Role changes take effect immediately.

title: Webhook Configuration
content: Webhooks can be configured under Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Supported events include user.created, report.exported, and ticket.updated. Webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256.

title: Session Timeout
content: Sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity by default. Admins can extend the timeout up to 8 hours under Admin Portal > Security Settings. Users will be prompted to re-authenticate after expiry.

title: Data Export Compliance
content: All data exports are logged for compliance purposes. GDPR data deletion requests can be submitted via Settings > Privacy > Data Request. Requests are processed within 72 hours.
